query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'tours'
AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('heroImage', 'heroImageAlt', 'heroSubtitle', 'colorTheme', 'keyFeatures', 'poeticContent')
ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute
